The '''Quelii Oversector''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Oversector/Legends|Priority Sector]].

==History==
The Quelii Oversector was the theaters of operations of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Tenth Army|10th Sector Army]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After the [[Declaration of a New Order]], it was reorganized in an Imperial Priority Sector and placed under the rule of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Tanniel]].<ref name="TEGtW" /><ref name="EGTW5">{{Tumblr|subdomain=jasonfry|url=post/22128732052/eg-to-warfare-endnotes-pt-5|name=Jason Fry's Dorkery|text=EG to Warfare: Endnotes Pt. 5}}</ref>

The Oversector had presumably been created to prosecute the ongoing war against the warlike [[Drackmarian]]s, who were the dominant species of the Sector, but it also contained [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]], with its Force-strong population, strategic mineral resources, and enigmatic lodes of lost knowledge and technology.

The Quelii Oversector was later given to [[Zsinj]], [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]], in recognition of his brilliant career. In this new position, one of Grand Moff Zsinj's duties was to conquer the Drackmarians and control the Rimward stretch of the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]]. To this end, his forces was supplemented with [[Crimson Command]]'s refitted [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] along with the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]], [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Brawl'']], making his [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Group]] the largest fleet in the Empire.<ref name="TEGtW" />

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], when the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]] recalled the Quelii Oversector's Sector Fleet to the Core, Zsinj ignored the order. Instead, he declared himself [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] and adopted the white uniform of a [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]], embarking on a war of conquest that brought a third of the former Empire under his control, in a sprawling tyranny with the Quelii Oversector at the heart of his [[Zsinj's Empire|empire]].

Subsequently, it was in Quelii space that the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] won two major defeats against Zsinj, at the [[Battle of Selaggis]] and the [[Battle of Dathomir (Hunt for Zsinj)|Battle of Dathomir]], and subsequent New Republic influence was responsible for reforms such as freeing the [[Chev]] from slavery to the [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] on [[Vinsoth/Legends|Vinsoth]]. Even before Zsinj's defeat, however, the Empire had made inroads to the area as far as [[Halmad/Legends|Halmad]], subsequently reoccupying Dathomir in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and remaining a threat in the region until at least [[23 ABY/Legends|23 ABY]].
